title_en: PI, AI4Rad Lab · Assistant Researcher · Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital
title_cn: AI4Rad Lab 课题组 PI · 助理研究员 · 上海交通大学医学院附属第六人民医院
bio_en: PI of AI4Rad Lab and Assistant Researcher at Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital, SJTU School of Medicine. PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from Shanghai Jiao Tong University (2024), advised by Prof. Ya Zhang. Research interests include medical vision-language models and cross-distribution generalization on clinical data.
bio_cn: AI4Rad 实验室课题组 PI、上海交通大学医学院附属第六人民医院放射介入科助理研究员。2024 年于上海交通大学获信息与通信工程博士学位，师从张娅教授。研究方向为医学视觉语言模型与临床数据跨分布泛化。

news_en.text: LumbarSR — paired clinical CT & micro-CT dataset for lumbar vertebra super-resolution — accepted by Scientific Data. Co-first author.
Paper accepted in npj Digital Medicine (SCI Q1, IF 15.2). Co-first author.
Paper accepted in IEEE Trans. Medical Imaging.
Paper accepted in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR).

news_cn.text: LumbarSR —— 配对临床 CT 与显微 CT 的腰椎超分辨率数据集，被 Scientific Data 接收。共同第一作者。
一篇论文被 npj Digital Medicine 接收（SCI Q1, IF 15.2）。共同第一作者。
一篇论文被 IEEE Trans. Medical Imaging 接收。
一篇论文被 Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR) 接收。
